utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items with content. Now check if each is fully specified: (1) property: includes address, bedrooms, bathrooms, square_feet, price, school_district, features — fully specified. (2) financing: includes mortgage type, LTV, interest rate, down payment, mortgage amount, monthly payment, arrangement fee — fully specified. (3) legal_services: includes service, scope, cost — fully specified. (4) moving_services: includes service, scope, cost — fully specified. (5) setup_services: includes survey, inspection, utilities, school_registration with costs — fully specified. (6) total_budget: includes property_down_payment, total_services_cost, total_upfront_investment, available_funds, remaining_funds — fully specified. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are covered.
